# DesignSystem Shadow Spec

> DesignSystem - Compose Multiplatform theme infrastructure and reusable component library implementing the 62-component design system

**Status:** Planned
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

## Context Imports

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/DEPENDENCIES.md")
```

---

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Core Design System — shared across all features
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/petergabriel/budgetcalendar/core/designsystem/
// ├── theme/
// │   ├── BudgetCalendarTheme.kt       # Top-level CompositionLocal theme provider
// │   ├── Color.kt                      # Design token color definitions
// │   ├── Typography.kt                 # Type scale with Outfit + Inter
// │   ├── Spacing.kt                    # Spacing tokens as CompositionLocal
// │   ├── Radius.kt                     # Border radius tokens
// │   └── Shadow.kt                     # Shadow/elevation tokens
// ├── component/
// │   ├── button/
// │   │   ├── BcButton.kt               # Primary, Outline, Ghost, Destructive, Icon variants
// │   │   └── ButtonDefaults.kt         # Shared button styling defaults
// │   ├── card/
// │   │   ├── AccountCardDark.kt        # Dark account card (XOueE)
// │   │   └── AccountCardLight.kt       # Light account card (iDE7I)
// │   ├── badge/
// │   │   └── BcBadge.kt               # Pending, Overdue, Success, Warning, Error, Info
// │   ├── calendar/
// │   │   ├── DayWrapperActive.kt       # Selected day cell (AbKW9)
// │   │   └── DayWrapperDefault.kt      # Default day cell (sqaBa)
// │   ├── form/
// │   │   ├── BcInputGroup.kt           # Input with label (c9XFF)
// │   │   ├── BcTextareaGroup.kt        # Multi-line input (auccy)
// │   │   ├── BcCheckboxRow.kt          # Checkbox with label (4SRSD)
// │   │   ├── BcToggleSwitch.kt         # Toggle switch (tA0BH)
// │   │   ├── BcRadioGroup.kt           # Radio group + item (iN2jx, VWxgC)
// │   │   ├── BcSelectGroup.kt          # Dropdown select (8G9pp)
// │   │   ├── BcNumberInput.kt          # Number input (qpBrt)
// │   │   └── LargeAmountInput.kt       # Hero amount entry (L2zpZ)
// │   ├── feedback/
// │   │   ├── BcDialog.kt               # Modal dialog (TFM6d)
// │   │   ├── BcConfirmDialog.kt        # Confirm dialog (0JGwC)
// │   │   ├── BcAlert.kt               # Success/Warning/Error/Info alerts
// │   │   ├── BcToast.kt               # Toast notification (TzE0w)
// │   │   └── BcTooltip.kt             # Tooltip (8CxCm)
// │   ├── layout/
// │   │   ├── BcHeader.kt              # Page header (CvyNk)
// │   │   ├── BcSectionHeader.kt       # Section header (O3ux1)
// │   │   ├── BcStatusBar.kt           # Status bar (QqCcu)
// │   │   └── BcTabBarPill.kt          # Bottom navigation (EZOJk)
// │   ├── list/
// │   │   ├── BcListContainer.kt       # List container (mhCFr)
// │   │   ├── BcListItem.kt            # List item (rJTFv)
// │   │   └── BcAccordionItem.kt       # Accordion item (JxzdM)
// │   ├── metrics/
// │   │   ├── HeroSafeToSpend.kt       # Safe to Spend hero (0yIOD)
// │   │   ├── HeroNetWorth.kt          # Net Worth hero (UexMB)
// │   │   └── BcStatCard.kt            # Stat card (X1K6P)
// │   ├── navigation/
// │   │   ├── BcTabsVertical.kt        # Vertical tabs (hpkIJ)
// │   │   ├── BcBreadcrumbs.kt         # Breadcrumbs (7NUcN)
// │   │   └── BcSidebarNavigation.kt   # Sidebar nav (Z8E9a)
// │   ├── transaction/
// │   │   ├── TransactionItem.kt        # Transaction row (Ks9uf)
// │   │   ├── ScheduleCard.kt           # Schedule card (0N6DT)
// │   │   └── TransactionListMobile.kt  # Mobile transaction list (S7FdH)
// │   ├── sandbox/
// │   │   ├── SimulationForm.kt         # Simulation form (Ksdjt)
// │   │   └── ResultsList.kt            # Results list (qE6i6)
// │   ├── common/
// │   │   ├── BcSegmentedControl.kt     # Segmented control (mTtvR)
// │   │   ├── BcSearchBar.kt           # Search bar (HVMad)
// │   │   └── BcProgressBar.kt         # Progress bar (WdLZn)
// │   └── utility/
// │       ├── BcDivider.kt             # Horizontal/vertical dividers
// │       ├── BcSkeleton.kt            # Skeleton loading (SNgxx)
// │       └── BcPagination.kt          # Pagination (wCzH5)
// └── icon/
//     └── BcIcons.kt                    # Lucide icon references
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Design Token Models — not persistent, compile-time constants

// Color tokens mapped from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md Section 2.1
interface BcColors {
  bgDark: Color;           // #000000
  bgMuted: Color;          // #27272A
  bgPrimary: Color;        // #FFFFFF
  bgSurface: Color;        // #F4F4F5
  textPrimary: Color;      // #000000
  textSecondary: Color;    // #71717A
  textTertiary: Color;     // #A1A1AA
  textInverted: Color;     // #FFFFFF
  textDisabled: Color;     // #D4D4D8
  borderStrong: Color;     // #E4E4E7
  borderSubtle: Color;     // #F4F4F5
  colorSuccess: Color;     // #22C55E
  colorSuccessBg: Color;   // #DCFCE7
  colorError: Color;       // #EF4444
  colorErrorBg: Color;     // #FEE2E2
  colorWarning: Color;     // #F59E0B
  colorWarningBg: Color;   // #FEF3C7
  colorInfo: Color;        // #3B82F6
  colorInfoBg: Color;      // #DBEAFE
}

// Typography styles mapped from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md Section 3.2
interface BcTypography {
  displayLarge: TextStyle;     // 72pt, Outfit, 900
  displayMedium: TextStyle;    // 56pt, Outfit, 900
  headline: TextStyle;         // 40pt, Outfit, 800
  title: TextStyle;            // 32pt, Outfit, 800
  section: TextStyle;          // 24pt, Outfit, 800
  cardTitle: TextStyle;        // 20pt, Outfit, 800
  bodyLarge: TextStyle;        // 16pt, Inter, 600
  bodyMedium: TextStyle;       // 14pt, Inter, 500
  bodySmall: TextStyle;        // 12pt, Inter, 400
  caption: TextStyle;          // 11pt, Outfit, 600
  calendarDay: TextStyle;      // 32pt, Outfit, 900
  calendarAmount: TextStyle;   // 11pt, Outfit, 600
}

// Spacing tokens mapped from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md Section 4.1
interface BcSpacing {
  spacing1: Dp;    // 4.dp
  spacing2: Dp;    // 8.dp
  spacing3: Dp;    // 12.dp
  spacing4: Dp;    // 16.dp
  spacing5: Dp;    // 20.dp
  spacing6: Dp;    // 24.dp
  spacing8: Dp;    // 32.dp
  spacing10: Dp;   // 40.dp
  spacing12: Dp;   // 48.dp
}

// Radius tokens mapped from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md Section 4.2
interface BcRadius {
  sm: Dp;       // 4.dp
  md: Dp;       // 8.dp
  lg: Dp;       // 12.dp
  xl: Dp;       // 16.dp
  xxl: Dp;      // 20.dp
  full: Dp;     // 9999.dp (use CircleShape)
}

// Shadow tokens mapped from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md Section 4.3
interface BcShadows {
  sm: Shadow;    // 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)
  md: Shadow;    // 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)
  lg: Shadow;    // 0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)
  xl: Shadow;    // 0 20px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)
}

// Transaction state visual mapping
enum TransactionStateStyle {
  CONFIRMED = { bg: bgSurface, text: textPrimary, border: borderStrong, icon: null }
  PENDING = { bg: colorWarningBg, text: colorWarning, border: colorWarning, icon: "clock" }
  OVERDUE = { bg: colorErrorBg, text: colorError, border: colorError, icon: "alert-triangle" }
}

// Badge variant
enum BadgeVariant {
  PENDING = "pending"
  OVERDUE = "overdue"
  SUCCESS = "success"
  WARNING = "warning"
  ERROR = "error"
  INFO = "info"
}

// Alert variant
enum AlertVariant {
  SUCCESS = "success"
  WARNING = "warning"
  ERROR = "error"
  INFO = "info"
}

// Button variant
enum ButtonVariant {
  PRIMARY = "primary"
  OUTLINE = "outline"
  GHOST = "ghost"
  DESTRUCTIVE = "destructive"
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: All color values must use BcColors tokens, never raw hex in UI code
Constraint: All text must use BcTypography styles, never inline TextStyle construction
Constraint: All spacing must use BcSpacing tokens, never raw dp values
Constraint: All corner rounding must use BcRadius tokens
Constraint: Outfit font used for display, headline, title, section, cardTitle, caption, calendarDay, calendarAmount
Constraint: Inter font used for bodyLarge, bodyMedium, bodySmall
Constraint: Monetary amounts always use color-success for positive, color-error for negative
Constraint: All interactive elements must meet 44x44dp minimum touch target (WCAG 2.1 AA)
Constraint: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for body text, 3:1 for large text and UI components
Constraint: Component naming uses "Bc" prefix to avoid Material3 naming collisions (e.g. BcButton, BcBadge)
Constraint: Theme provider must be applied at App root — all composables access tokens via BudgetCalendarTheme
Constraint: Font files (.ttf) must be placed in composeResources/font/ and loaded via Res.font
Constraint: No platform-specific UI code in design system — all components live in commonMain
Constraint: BcTabBarPill must render the add (+) button centered between the first half and second half of tabs — render tabs[0..n/2-1], then the add button, then tabs[n/2..n-1]; for 4 tabs this produces [Home][Calendar][+][Accounts][Me] as specified in EZOJk and the Main Dashboard layout (DESIGN_SYSTEM.md Section 6.1)
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Theme Initialization Flow
App Start |> BudgetCalendarTheme { content }
  |> Provide CompositionLocal(BcColors)
  |> Provide CompositionLocal(BcTypography)
  |> Provide CompositionLocal(BcSpacing)
  |> Provide CompositionLocal(BcRadius)
  |> MaterialTheme(colorScheme = bcColorScheme, typography = bcMaterialTypography)
  |> content()

// Component Token Resolution Flow
Composable |> BudgetCalendarTheme.colors.tokenName
  |> Returns Color from CompositionLocal
  |> Applied to Modifier or parameter

// Font Loading Flow
App Init |> Res.font.outfit_bold, Res.font.inter_regular, etc.
  |> FontFamily(Font(resource))
  |> Used in TextStyle definitions in BcTypography
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
// Theme
fn BudgetCalendarTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit)
fn BudgetCalendarTheme.colors: BcColors           // CompositionLocal accessor
fn BudgetCalendarTheme.typography: BcTypography
fn BudgetCalendarTheme.spacing: BcSpacing
fn BudgetCalendarTheme.radius: BcRadius

// Buttons (Section 5.7)
fn BcButton(text: String, onClick: () -> Unit, variant: ButtonVariant, enabled: Boolean, leadingIcon: ImageVector?, trailingIcon: ImageVector?)

// Badges (Section 5.10)
fn BcBadge(text: String, variant: BadgeVariant)

// Cards (Section 5.4)
fn AccountCardDark(badge: String, amount: String, description: String, onClick: () -> Unit)
fn AccountCardLight(badge: String, amount: String, description: String, onClick: () -> Unit)

// Calendar (Section 5.2)
fn DayWrapperActive(dayLetter: String, showDot: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit)
fn DayWrapperDefault(dayLetter: String, showDot: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit)

// Metrics (Section 5.5)
fn HeroSafeToSpend(primaryAmount: String, dailyRate: String)
fn HeroNetWorth(netWorth: String)
fn BcStatCard(label: String, value: String, trend: String?)

// Form Controls (Section 5.6, 5.8)
fn BcInputGroup(label: String, value: String, onValueChange: (String) -> Unit, placeholder: String)
fn BcTextareaGroup(label: String, value: String, onValueChange: (String) -> Unit, placeholder: String)
fn BcCheckboxRow(label: String, checked: Boolean, onCheckedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit)
fn BcToggleSwitch(label: String, checked: Boolean, onCheckedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit)
fn BcRadioGroup(options: List<String>, selected: String, onSelect: (String) -> Unit)
fn BcSelectGroup(label: String, options: List<String>, selected: String, onSelect: (String) -> Unit)
fn BcNumberInput(label: String, value: String, onValueChange: (String) -> Unit)
fn LargeAmountInput(label: String, amount: String, onAmountChange: (String) -> Unit)

// Layout (Section 5.6, 5.14)
fn BcHeader(title: String, onActionClick: () -> Unit?, showIcon: Boolean)
fn BcSectionHeader(title: String, action: String?, onActionClick: () -> Unit?)
fn BcTabBarPill(tabs: List<TabItem>, selectedIndex: Int, onTabSelected: (Int) -> Unit, onAddClick: () -> Unit)
fn BcSearchBar(query: String, onQueryChange: (String) -> Unit, placeholder: String)
fn BcSegmentedControl(activeText: String, inactiveText: String, isActiveSelected: Boolean, onToggle: () -> Unit)

// Transaction (Section 5.3)
fn TransactionItem(title: String, meta: String, amount: String, state: TransactionStateStyle, onClick: () -> Unit)
fn ScheduleCard(date: String, title: String, meta: String, onClick: () -> Unit)

// Feedback (Section 5.11)
fn BcDialog(title: String, onDismiss: () -> Unit, actions: @Composable () -> Unit, content: @Composable () -> Unit)
fn BcConfirmDialog(icon: ImageVector, title: String, description: String, confirmText: String, onConfirm: () -> Unit, onDismiss: () -> Unit)
fn BcAlert(message: String, variant: AlertVariant)
fn BcToast(message: String, icon: ImageVector?)

// Lists (Section 5.13)
fn BcListContainer(content: @Composable () -> Unit)
fn BcListItem(icon: ImageVector, text: String, onClick: () -> Unit)
fn BcAccordionItem(title: String, isExpanded: Boolean, onToggle: () -> Unit, content: @Composable () -> Unit)

// Navigation (Section 5.9)
fn BcTabsVertical(tabs: List<TabItem>, selectedIndex: Int, onTabSelected: (Int) -> Unit)
fn BcBreadcrumbs(items: List<String>, onItemClick: (Int) -> Unit)

// Sandbox (Section 5.15)
fn SimulationForm(namePlaceholder: String, amountPlaceholder: String, buttonText: String, onSubmit: () -> Unit)
fn ResultsList(items: List<ResultItem>)

// Utility (Section 5.16)
fn BcDivider(isVertical: Boolean)
fn BcSkeleton(type: SkeletonType)
fn BcPagination(currentPage: Int, totalPages: Int, onPageChange: (Int) -> Unit)
fn BcProgressBar(label: String, progress: Float, value: String)
```

## UI Components

```sudolang
// This feature IS the component library. All components reference
// design system component IDs from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md Section 5.1.

// Component ID → Compose function mapping:
// AbKW9 (Day Wrapper / Active) → DayWrapperActive
// sqaBa (Day Wrapper / Default) → DayWrapperDefault
// Ks9uf (Transaction Item) → TransactionItem
// 0N6DT (Schedule Card) → ScheduleCard
// XOueE (Card / Dark) → AccountCardDark
// iDE7I (Card / Light) → AccountCardLight
// 0yIOD (Hero / Safe to Spend) → HeroSafeToSpend
// UexMB (Hero / Net Worth) → HeroNetWorth
// mTtvR (Segmented Control) → BcSegmentedControl
// mbxe4 (Button / Primary) → BcButton(variant = PRIMARY)
// xR72O (Button / Outline) → BcButton(variant = OUTLINE)
// MO989 (Button / Ghost) → BcButton(variant = GHOST)
// Ifqk0 (Button / Destructive) → BcButton(variant = DESTRUCTIVE)
// Bdc8O (Button / Primary Icon Leading) → BcButton(variant = PRIMARY, leadingIcon = ...)
// m39bO (Button / Outline Icon Trailing) → BcButton(variant = OUTLINE, trailingIcon = ...)
// HVMad (Search Bar) → BcSearchBar
// CvyNk (Header) → BcHeader
// O3ux1 (Section Header) → BcSectionHeader
// JxzdM (Accordion Item) → BcAccordionItem
// c9XFF (Input Group) → BcInputGroup
// 4SRSD (Checkbox Row) → BcCheckboxRow
// L2zpZ (Form / Large Amount Input) → LargeAmountInput
// auccy (Textarea Group) → BcTextareaGroup
// tA0BH (Toggle Switch) → BcToggleSwitch
// iN2jx (Radio Group) → BcRadioGroup
// VWxgC (Radio Item) → (internal to BcRadioGroup)
// 8G9pp (Select Group) → BcSelectGroup
// qpBrt (Number Input) → BcNumberInput
// EZOJk (Tab Bar Pill) → BcTabBarPill
// hpkIJ (Tabs / Vertical) → BcTabsVertical
// 7NUcN (Breadcrumbs) → BcBreadcrumbs
// Z8E9a (Sidebar Navigation) → BcSidebarNavigation
// CVw4C (Badge / Pending) → BcBadge(variant = PENDING)
// ywlyv (Badge / Overdue) → BcBadge(variant = OVERDUE)
// bHBso (Badge / Success) → BcBadge(variant = SUCCESS)
// pRGld (Badge / Warning) → BcBadge(variant = WARNING)
// b4SK9 (Badge / Error) → BcBadge(variant = ERROR)
// PkcO9 (Badge / Info) → BcBadge(variant = INFO)
// Ksdjt (Simulation Form) → SimulationForm
// qE6i6 (Results List) → ResultsList
// QqCcu (Status Bar) → BcStatusBar
// X1K6P (Stat Card) → BcStatCard
// WdLZn (Progress Bar) → BcProgressBar
// jsUSG (Avatar Group) → BcAvatarGroup
// VlWN4 (Avatar) → BcAvatar
// mhCFr (List Container) → BcListContainer
// rJTFv (List Item) → BcListItem
// CrHoZ (Table Wrapper) → (deferred — web-only)
// TFM6d (Modal / Dialog) → BcDialog
// 0JGwC (Confirm Dialog) → BcConfirmDialog
// tCFvy (Alert / Success) → BcAlert(variant = SUCCESS)
// GdTRQ (Alert / Warning) → BcAlert(variant = WARNING)
// 20TKu (Alert / Error) → BcAlert(variant = ERROR)
// 9teyP (Alert / Info) → BcAlert(variant = INFO)
// TzE0w (Toast / Success) → BcToast
// 8CxCm (Tooltip) → BcTooltip
// 8duML (Divider) → BcDivider(isVertical = false)
// 4ftwe (Divider / Vertical) → BcDivider(isVertical = true)
// SNgxx (Skeleton / Avatar Row) → BcSkeleton
// wCzH5 (Pagination) → BcPagination
// S7FdH (Transaction List / Mobile) → TransactionListMobile

// Layout section components (composites, not standalone):
// lktGa, QkEEz, K6q45, cWjai, JFDlk, oMq1b, sC3BH, wyzGY, 1Lvt4, hYiWT
// These are screen-level layout compositions built from the components above.
// They will be implemented as part of screen composables, not as standalone components.
```

// No database changes required.

## Dependencies

```sudolang
// External Dependencies
Dependency: compose-multiplatform (1.10.0) - UI framework
Dependency: compose-multiplatform-resources - Font loading via Res.font

// Font Assets (bundled in composeResources/font/)
Dependency: Outfit (.ttf) - Display font family (Google Fonts, OFL License)
Dependency: Inter (.ttf) - Body font family (Google Fonts, OFL License)

// Font weight files required:
// outfit_regular.ttf (400)
// outfit_medium.ttf (500)
// outfit_semibold.ttf (600)
// outfit_bold.ttf (700)
// outfit_extrabold.ttf (800)
// outfit_black.ttf (900)
// inter_regular.ttf (400)
// inter_medium.ttf (500)
// inter_semibold.ttf (600)

// Internal Dependencies
Dependency: core/utils - CurrencyUtils for amount formatting in components
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Font loading failure | Res.font resource not found | Fall back to system default font (sans-serif) |
| Large display text overflow | Hero amount exceeds container width | Use autoSizeText or reduce font size with maxLines = 1 |
| Long account name in card | Name exceeds 180px card width | Truncate with ellipsis (maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis) |
| Badge text too long | Custom badge text exceeds bounds | Truncate with ellipsis, max width constraint |
| Dark mode | System dark mode enabled | Not supported in v1 — design system is light-only. Ignore system dark mode setting |
| Dynamic type scaling | User has large font accessibility setting | All sp-based sizes scale with system; verify layout doesn't break at 200% scale |
| RTL languages | Right-to-left layout direction | Use Modifier.padding (not absolute) and Row with reversed arrangement |
| Small screens | Screen width < 360dp | Horizontal scroll for account card rows; stack layout for metrics |
| Toast stacking | Multiple toasts triggered simultaneously | Show only latest toast; previous ones dismissed |
| Dialog over dialog | Confirm dialog opened from modal | Dismiss parent modal first, or use nested dialog pattern |
